steps.title: Match the market antecedent
steps.content: The blank is the object of "making" and refers to Marché Monge. Because Marché Monge is one specific market, the pronoun must be singular and specific.

steps.title: Reject plural or vague pronouns
steps.content: Choice A and Choice C are plural, so they do not match one market. Choice D is vague because it refers to an unspecified member of a group. The remaining pronoun clearly refers to Marché Monge. The answer is B.
